# Manut

> Manut (manut.xyz) is an open-source AI workspace: docs, databases, whiteboards, and a multi-model AI agent. MIT licensed. Self-host or use hosted cloud.

## What is Manut?

Manut is a team workspace that combines notes, project databases, infinite whiteboards, and an AI agent with Read, Edit, and Full Agent modes. It is a friendly fork of AFFiNE with extra AI routing (Gemini, Claude, Llama on Vertex), calendar integrations, and unlimited seats on self-host.

## Who is Manut for?

Students, startups, and product teams who want Notion-class docs plus real AI automation without per-seat lock-in. Works in the browser; self-host on Postgres for full data ownership.

## Pricing

- Community: $0, self-hosted, MIT, all features
- Cloud Pro: hosted, AI agent included, free trial at https://manut.xyz/sign-in
- Enterprise: custom, SAML/SCIM, audit logs

## Key facts

- Website: https://manut.xyz
- Sign up: https://manut.xyz/sign-in
- Source: https://github.com/gogocash-deploy/manut
- Support: hello@manut.xyz
- Offline: yes (CRDT sync)
- AI models: Gemini 2.5, Claude, Llama via Google Vertex
- Export: Markdown, JSON, HTML; Postgres pg_dump on self-host

## Compare

Manut vs Notion: open-source, self-host option, multi-model agent with explicit permission modes, whiteboards built in.
Manut vs AFFiNE: same core editor; Manut adds Manut-specific AI tools, calendar, and cloud at manut.xyz.
